FISH & SEAFOOD

Halibut with Saffron Cream Sauce

An elegant fish dish with a subtle floral note from
saffron. Perfect for entertaining.

Ingredients:
- 4 halibut fillets (150g each)
- 1 teaspoon saffron threads
- 1/4 cup hot water
- 200ml heavy cream
- 2 shallots, finely diced
- 100ml dry white wine
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon olive oil
- Salt and white pepper
- Fresh dill for garnish
- 1 lemon, for serving

Instructions:
Steep saffron threads in hot water for 10 minutes. 67
Heat butter and olive oil in pan over medium-high heat.
Season halibut with salt and pepper.
Cook fillets 4-5 minutes per side until cooked through.
Remove and keep warm.
In same pan, sauté shallots until softened.
Add white wine, reduce by half.
Pour in saffron water and cream.
Simmer 3-4 minutes until slightly thickened.
Return halibut to pan, coat with sauce.
Serve garnished with fresh dill and lemon wedge.
Serves 4.
